% https://q.uiver.app/#
\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\input{preambles.tex}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzcd}
	{\mathds{1} \otimes A} && {A\otimes A} & A & {A\otimes A} && {A\otimes \mathds{1}} \\
	{\mathds{1} \otimes A} && {A\otimes A} & A & {A\otimes A} && {A\otimes \mathds{1}}
	\arrow["{\eta \otimes \operatorname{id}}", from=1-1, to=1-3]
	\arrow["\mu", from=1-3, to=1-4]
	\arrow["{1_A}", from=1-4, to=1-4, loop, in=60, out=120, distance=5mm]
	\arrow["\mu"', from=1-5, to=1-4]
	\arrow["{\operatorname{id} \otimes \eta}"', from=1-7, to=1-5]
	\arrow["{\varepsilon\otimes \operatorname{id}}"', from=2-3, to=2-1]
	\arrow["\delta"', from=2-4, to=2-3]
	\arrow["{1_A}", from=2-4, to=2-4, loop, in=60, out=120, distance=5mm]
	\arrow["\delta", from=2-4, to=2-5]
	\arrow["{\operatorname{id}\otimes \varepsilon}", from=2-5, to=2-7]
\end{tikzcd}
\end{document}
